summary: The Multi-Asset Token standard, compatible with [ERC-1155](./eip-1155.md), facilitates the development of a new fundamental component: the context-dependent data output for each collection. The context-dependent data output means that the asset is displayed in an appropriate format based on how the token is accessed. I.e., if the token is being opened in an e-book reader, the PDF asset is displayed; if the token is opened in the marketplace, the PNG or the SVG asset is displayed; if the token is accessed from within a game, the 3D model asset is accessed, and if the token is accessed by an Internet of Things (IoT) hub, the asset providing the necessary addressing and specification information is accessed. A Token Collection can have multiple assets (outputs), which can be any file to order
title: ERC-1155 Multi-Asset extension
